form.formComment: Last outing finished fourth in a small field at Ascot on March 29 over 4200m, 62 len behind Sherborne carrying 76kg at $13. Start before pulled up at Doncaster on February 28 over 5200m. Looks tested without significant improvement.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished third in a small field at this track on March 24 over 4600m, 9 len behind Ede'iffs Rock carrying 75kg at $4. Previously second-up finished fourth in a small field at Exeter on January 9 over 4800m, 42 len behind Silver Thorn with 70.5kg at $5. Strips fitter and is again a top chance.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Freshened for 41 days. form.formComment: Last run finished second in a small field at Southwell on April 1 over 4900m, 3 len behind Hell Hound carrying 70kg at $4.50. Before that pulled up at Chepstow on March 15 over 4700m. Looms as a top chance.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Comes off a 42 day let-up. Last run finished second of 8 runners at Ludlow on February 26 over 4770m, 2.75 len behind Martalmix'jac carrying 75.5kg at $15. Before that finished second of 9 starters at Ludlow on January 15 over 4800m, 4.5 len behind Annie Express with 71.5kg at $4.50. Well-placed to take this out.
